description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches pip files in $HOME/.cache/pip keyed by the project name, uses the postgres:latest service, defines two stages (test and release), and includes TheLab CI components for review, pre‑commit checks, GitLab release publishing, and PyPI publishing. In the test stage add a test job that runs on a matrix of three Python images (3.12, 3.13, 3.14) from registry.gitlab.com/thelabnyc/python:${IMAGE}, sets TOX_SKIP_ENV for each matrix entry, executes 'uv sync --all-extras' then 'uv run tox', and captures coverage using the regex /^TOTAL.+?(\d+\%)$/. The job runs only when the commit is on a protected branch or triggered by a merge‑request event, and PostgreSQL connection variables (POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD) are provided for the service.
